transcript: It is easy to overlook simple joys found within daily routine, but sometimes all it takes is a little color to add vibrancy in everyday moments. As a full-time content creator, it is the little unexpected things that spark creativity in the kitchen. This year, I'm partnering up with KitchenAid to celebrate 2022 Color of the Year. This year's color reflects the vibrancy of everyday moments, whether it is adding plants around the house, buying yourself flowers to put a smile on your face, or even making your favorite drink while cooking. Sometimes we tend to overlook the magic that happens in our daily routine. This is why KitchenAid's design team chose a color that embodies playfulness to celebrate the everyday moments that matter the most. Can you guess what the KitchenAid 2022 color of the year is?
